title: Type 1 MI Atherothrombotic Pathway — De Novo Molecule Atlas

coverage_delta.note: Re-found by a robust match against the 260-molecule prior catalog: gene symbol, normalized name, acronym aliases (e.g. TMAO=Trimethylamine N-oxide, MDA=malondialdehyde, SAA=serum amyloid A), parenthetical gene aliases, and full name-word containment. All 92 entries not re-found are miRNA/lncRNA isoforms the prior catalog enumerates at finer granularity (e.g. miR-133a-3p vs the consolidated miR-133 here) — the same molecules are present at family level. There are no non-miRNA absences: the single genuine protein miss (Gas6) has been harvested and added.
